coaching.title: Today's Run
coaching.message: Build Phase, 15 weeks (104 days) to Julian Alps. Friday = pre-weekend setup: 45-60 min easy Zone 2, flat or rolling, conversational pace. Keep it light — tomorrow kicks off your back-to-back long run weekend. If traveling today, a 40 min treadmill incline walk at 12-15% is a fine substitute that still banks vert.

coaching.title: Fuel Right
coaching.message: Carb-load lightly tonight for tomorrow's long run: 2-3 g/kg carbs at dinner (rice, pasta, potatoes). Start gut training on the long run — practice 60-80 g carbs/hour using the exact gels and chews you'll carry in Slovenia. The gut adapts like a muscle; 15 weeks is the right time to begin.

coaching.title: Recovery
coaching.message: Protect 8 hours of sleep tonight ahead of the weekend block. If you're crossing time zones this week, anchor your bedtime to local time immediately and get morning sunlight — sleep debt before back-to-backs is where Build Phase injuries start.

coaching.title: Mental Edge
coaching.message: 104 days out. Julian Alps will hand you ~2500 m of vert and fast-changing alpine weather — you can't control either, only your response. This weekend, practice one thing: when the legs complain on climbs, shorten your stride, drop your eyes 3 m ahead, and count 20 steps. That reset is your race-day tool.
